scripts.ci: corepack pnpm@10.0.0 typecheck && corepack pnpm@10.0.0 release:check
scripts.dev: corepack pnpm@10.0.0 --filter chatbot-page build && corepack pnpm@10.0.0 --parallel --filter chatbot-page --filter example-next dev
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm@10.0.0 --filter chatbot-page build && corepack pnpm@10.0.0 -r typecheck
